top_signals.title: Trump, Republican senator in shouting match over unpopular Iran war - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Trump, Republican senator in shouting match over unpopular Iran war  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Spotlight shines on Aryna Sabalenka’s mental struggles ahead of Wimbledon
top_signals.summary: Gustavo Granitto, an International Tennis ⁠Federation coach, said Sabalenka's competitive ​drive sometimes blurred her decision-making.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Abracadabra takes emergency action as MIM stablecoin depeg worsens
top_signals.summary: The protocol is raising interest rates across all Cauldrons to encourage debt repayment and reduce supply.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Anthropic accuses Alibaba of campaign to 'brazenly' and 'illicitly' extract AI capabilities
top_signals.summary: The letter, which was obtained by CNBC, claims Alibaba carried out "the largest known distillation attack on Anthropic to date."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Investors still seek a human touch even with AI tools at hand: HSBC
top_signals.summary: Investors are still turning to the judgment of a professional adviser in their last investment decision, despite using AI tools, a HSBC survey found.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
